TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Arthur Agee sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 10, Arthur Agee, biru na Bunge'. trang mrkyas Agee ga maki beh Chicago area near qasa. pqwasan biru 1987 kawas na huqan abaw,t'aring mqwas hopa pqwasan biru qyanux nya. pinqbaqan nya Arthur Agee mqwas biru sa Marshall Metro pqwsan biru seneng. Arthur Agee mqwas biru sa Arkansas State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: artħur aɣee s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, artħur aɣee, βiru na βuŋeʔ. traŋ mrkjas~ɕ aɣee ɣa maki βeħ ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo area near qas~ɕa. pqwas~ɕan βiru **** kawas~ɕ na ħuqan aβaw,tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru qjanux nja. pinqβaqan nja artħur aɣee mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa mars~ɕħall metro pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. artħur aɣee mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa arkans~ɕas~ɕ s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Arthur Agee sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 10, Arthur Agee, biru na Bunge'. trang mrkyas Agee ga maki beh Chicago area near qasa. pqwasan biru 1987 kawas na huqan abaw,t'aring mqwas hopa pqwasan biru qyanux nya. pinqbaqan nya Arthur Agee mqwas biru sa Marshall Metro pqwsan biru seneng. Arthur Agee mqwas biru sa Arkansas State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
